content.query:
------------------------------
--ROUND ROBIN DISTRIBUTATION
------------------------------
CREATE TABLE round_table (
    Id INT,
    Name VARCHAR(4000),
    salary INT
    
)
WITH
(
    DISTRIBUTION=ROUND_ROBIN
)

INSERT INTO round_table
values (1,'Harish',20000);

SELECT * FROM round_table

------------------------------
--REPLICATE DISTRIBUTATION
------------------------------

CREATE SCHEMA gold;

CREATE TABLE gold.dim_product
(
    dim_key_prod INT,
    prod_id INT,
    prod_name VARCHAR(4000)
)
WITH
(
    DISTRIBUTION=REPLICATE
)

------------------------------
--HASH DISTRIBUTATION
------------------------------
CREATE TABLE gold.facttable
(
    dim_key_prod INT,
    revenue INT,
    cost INT
)
WITH
(
    DISTRIBUTION=HASH(dim_key_prod)
)
